sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position size derived from T = (AAT/GAT) × (Biggest Loss / -f), where optimal_f is calculated from historical trade distribution. Entry condition requires sufficient funds to cover margin after maximum historical drawdown. Base risk % varies based on individual trade history optimization.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by calculating a threshold to geometric mean using the ratio of arithmetic average trade to geometric average trade, adjusted by optimal f and the biggest historical loss.
